t_ch: 丹恒是对的。我很想一剑了结你可憎的性命……
t_en: Dan Heng is right. My sword yearns to end your pathetic life...

t_ch: 但对穷途末路的你而言，最好的惩罚应该是亲眼看着黄金裔完成使命。
t_en: But to a cornered dog like you, the most deserving punishment is to personally witness the Chrysos Heirs fulfill their mission.

t_ch: 这样…你才知道你曾经的恶行是多么无谓而愚蠢。
t_en: Only then... will you truly know how meaningless and foolish your past transgressions were.

t_ch: 呵…完成使命？
t_en: Heh... Fulfill your mission?

t_ch: 刻法勒的火种已经消失无踪。你们…要如何践行神谕？
t_en: Kephale's Coreflame is long lost to the winds. How will you... fulfill the prophecy?

t_ch: 消失无踪…？
t_en: Lost to the winds...?

t_ch: 她已经疯了…以至于满口胡言乱语。
t_en: She's gone completely mad... to the point where she's just spewing nonsense.

t_ch: 长久以来，刻法勒的火种都被供奉于此…唯有元老院的核心成员才知道开启火种匣的方法。
t_en: For the longest time, Kephale's Coreflame has been worshiped here... Only core members of the Council of Elders know how to activate the Coreflame Casket.

t_ch: 现在去哪找核心成员？
t_en: How're we gonna find a core member now?

t_ch: 不…用不着麻烦了。
t_en: No... There's no need for such trouble.

t_ch: 只能逼凯妮斯帮我们了。
t_en: We'll just have to force Caenis to help us.

t_ch: 不…不需要她帮忙。
t_en: No... We don't need her help.

t_ch: 那个来古士，找他？
t_en: That Lygus, should we seek him out?

t_ch: 不…不必费那个功夫了。
t_en: No... There's no need to go through that effort.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师教会我的，不止课本上的知识。
t_en: Professor Anaxa taught me more than just what was in the textbooks.

t_ch: 黄金裔的罪孽…终于化作了神明的惩罚……
t_en: The sins of the Chrysos Heirs... have finally transformed into divine punishment...

t_ch: 我们…无论谁都无法逃脱……
t_en: None of us... no one can escape...

t_ch: 别管她，{NICKNAME}…专注于目标吧。
t_en: Leave her, {NICKNAME}... Focus on the objective.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？
t_en: Where are you going, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 回来吧，解开火种匣需要借助你的力量。
t_en: Come back. We need your powers to open the Coreflame Casket.

t_ch: 在黎明云崖驻留期间，那刻夏老师对各处都进行了…勘察。
t_en: During his time at Dawncloud, Professor Anaxa conducted... surveys in various areas.

t_ch: 我还记得他口述的方法——但愿管用。
t_en: I still remember the words he used. I hope it works.

t_ch: 「担负世界的全知之父，请将你那慈悲的目光分我一瞥。」
t_en: "All-Knowing Father who bears the world, please share a glimpse of your merciful gaze with me."

t_ch: 「降下悬于全世之巅的泰坦心火，供你虔诚的造物瞻望。」
t_en: "Cast down the Titan's fire that hangs at the pinnacle of the world, for your devout creations to behold."

t_ch: …成功了。
t_en: ...It worked.

t_ch: 还差一步…要解开它的秘术锁…{NICKNAME}，恐怕还要借助你的力量。
t_en: One step left... To undo its arcane seal... {NICKNAME}, I may require your strength again.

t_ch: 丹恒，你还能再施展一次灵水术么？
t_en: Dan Heng, can you use the spirit water art again?

t_ch: 我随身携带的灵水已经用完了。而且……
t_en: I've used up all the spirit water I brought. And...

t_ch: 就在刚才，我们离开晨昏之眼以后…我感觉翁法罗斯的水体和我切断了联系。
t_en: Just now, after we left the Eye of Twilight... I felt the waters of Amphoreus severing their connection with me.

t_ch: 这也是黑潮的影响么…看来我们只能跑下山了。
t_en: Is this also a result of the black tide...? Looks like all we can do is sprint down the mountain.

t_ch: 呵…你们以为…我彻底疯了？
t_en: Heh... You all thought... I completely lost my mind?

t_ch: 假如火种没被动过手脚，一直原封不动地存放于此……
t_en: If the Coreflame was never tampered with, and has always remained here untouched...

t_ch: 你们以为…我没有能力将它带走？
t_en: You all think... I wouldn't have the power to take it away?

t_ch: 哈…哈哈哈哈！！
t_en: Ha... Hahahaha!!!

t_ch: 糟糕，这下没戏唱了…
t_en: Uh oh, looks like it's end of the line for us...

t_ch: 冷静下来…仔细想想。
t_en: Calm down... and think carefully.

t_ch: 该去哪找火种…？
t_en: Where should we go to look for the Coreflame...?

t_ch: 冷静下来…仔细想想。
t_en: Calm down... and think carefully.

t_ch: 猖狂！我替你砍了她——
t_en: Madness! I will strike her down for you!!!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，冷静！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, calm down!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「我会完成我该做的事，所以——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"I'll do my job, so you..."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「在支付等价的报酬以前，你们可别先死了哪。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Need to make sure you don't die before you pay me."</color>

t_ch: …不用为火种的下落担忧，我们接着下山。
t_en: ...There's no need to worry about the Coreflame's whereabouts. Let's just descend the mountain.

t_ch: 不必担忧？可是……
t_en: No need to worry? But...

t_ch: 出发讨伐艾格勒以前，我拜托赛飞儿小姐，在我们离开时保护好刻法勒的火种…不择手段。
t_en: Before setting off to defeat Aquila, I entrusted Miss Cipher with the task of protecting Kephale's Coreflame while we were gone... by any means necessary.

t_ch: 火种既然不在这里…那一定是她动了手脚。换句话说…她以自己的方式履行了职责。
t_en: If the Coreflame isn't here... that means she must have done something to it. In other words... she fulfilled her duty using her own means.

t_ch: 我们只管继续向创世涡心进发，赛飞儿一定会赴约的。
t_en: We just have to focus on getting to the Vortex of Genesis, and Cipher will meet us there for sure.

t_ch: 你就这么相信她？
t_en: You trust her that much?

t_ch: 万一她出了什么意外…
t_en: What if something happened to her...

t_ch: 但假如她没成功……
t_en: But if she wasn't successful...

t_ch: 丹恒，{NICKNAME}——除了信任，我们现在已经没有别的选择。
t_en: Dan Heng, {NICKNAME} — we have no choice other than to trust her.

t_ch: 假设从这里到最近的祭仪水盆有万步之遥…那我们要做的就是一路奔跑，然后企盼她会在还剩九千步时跟我们汇合。
t_en: If the nearest ritual basin is ten thousand paces away... then what we have to do is to run in that direction and hope she meets us after one thousand paces.

t_ch: 假如她没有出现，那我们就继续向前…寄希望于她会在八千步的地方出现。
t_en: If she doesn't show up, we will keep going... and trust that we will see her at two thousand paces.

t_ch: 七千，六千，五千…我会带着同样的希望一直企盼下去——
t_en: Three, four, five thousand... I will keep hoping with the same resolve, all the way...

t_ch: ——直到她出现在我们面前，带着一贯玩世不恭的表情。
t_en: ...Until she shows up in front of us, with her usual rebellious attitude.

t_ch: …我明白了。
t_en: ...I understand.

t_ch: 至少，到今天为止…我不记得有哪位参与到逐火之旅中的黄金裔辜负过自己的使命。
t_en: At least, to this day... I don't recall any Chrysos Heirs failing their mission for the Flame-Chase Journey.

t_ch: …她一定也不会例外。
t_en: ...She will be no exception.

t_ch: 但前提是…我们得活下去，突破重围！
t_en: But before that... we must survive and break through this siege!

t_ch: 那还用说，搭档！
t_en: Of course, partner!

t_ch: 你也要信任我们！
t_en: You have to trust us too!

t_ch: 末日？早就习惯了！
t_en: Another apocalypse? Been there, done that!

t_ch: 解决了。走吧，我们——
t_en: It's done. Let's go, we...

t_ch: …白厄。
t_en: ...Phainon.
Ah...

t_ch: 罪有应得的结果。
t_en: A fate well deserved.

t_ch: 也许吧，但……
t_en: Perhaps, but...

t_ch: 也算是个枭雄了。
t_en: She was a formidable foe to the end.

t_ch: 她的所作所为的确无可饶恕，但……
t_en: Her actions may have been deplorable, but...

t_ch: 我不会为她流一滴泪。
t_en: I will not shed a single tear for her.

t_ch: 恐怕她也没奢求过他人的同情。但……
t_en: She may not have sought sympathy from others, but...

t_ch: 「清洗者」为了一个千年不变的目标，甘愿以禁术维系千年的身份和记忆…这大概也是一种扭曲到极致的坚韧吧？
t_en: As a "Cleaner," she was willing to use forbidden arts to absorb a millennium of identities and memories for an objective that hasn't changed in that time... I suppose this is also a form of extreme but twisted resilience?

t_ch: 走吧…该离开这里了。
t_en: Let's go... It's time to leave this place.

t_ch: 大、大家！
t_en: E—Everyone!

t_ch: 你们快看，身后……
t_en: Look, behind us...

t_ch: 盗火行者……
t_en: The Flame Reaver...

t_ch: 终究…还是来了啊。
t_en: In the end... they still showed up.

t_ch: 现在不是恋战的时候…
t_en: Now's not the time for a fight...

t_ch: 我同意……
t_en: I agree...

t_ch: 要检验你的特训成果么？
t_en: You gonna test the results of your training?

t_ch: 不…不该是现在。
t_en: No... Now is not the time.

t_ch: 我一直在等着，能有一个机会和它正面对决……
t_en: I've been waiting for a chance to face them head-on...

t_ch: 但不是现在…假如我们在这里恋战，然后失手…后果将无可挽回。
t_en: But not now... If we take the fight here, then lose... the consequences would be irreversible.

t_ch: 走…我们必须离开这里——
t_en: Come on... We have to get out of here.

t_ch: 一路奔跑…绝对不要回头！
t_en: Keep running... and never turn back!

t_ch: 它是怎么……
t_en: How did they...

t_ch: 黄昏…如约降临……
t_en: Dusk... has descended as ordained...

t_ch: 这世界…必须…重启……
t_en: This world... must... be reset...

t_ch: 分身，幻术…净是些藏身阴影的把戏。
t_en: Clones, illusions... nothing but cheap tricks to help you hide in the shadows.

t_ch: 「天空」…已经归位……
t_en: The Sky... has returned to its rightful place...

t_ch: 它…它到底在说什么呢？！
t_en: What... What are they talking about!?

t_ch: 你在寻找的终点…也是「创世奇迹」么？
t_en: The end you seek... is also the Miracle of Genesis?

t_ch: 若是如此，那你本应站在黄金裔身旁！为何要阻挠我们，「盗火行者」？
t_en: If so, you should be standing alongside the Chrysos Heirs! Why do you hinder us, "Flame Reaver"?

t_ch: 黄昏…如约降临……
t_en: Dusk... has descended as ordained...

t_ch: 必须…重启……
t_en: Must... reset...

t_ch: 放弃和它沟通吧……
t_en: Just give up on talking sense to them...

t_ch: 理智的缺失…是无法逾越的沟壑。
t_en: The lack of reason... can't be overcome.

t_ch: 该展现训练成果了，白厄。
t_en: It's time to show off the fruits of your training, Phainon.

t_ch: 到了最后关头…还是免不了正面一战。
t_en: In the end... direct confrontation was inevitable.

t_ch: 如此有压迫感的复读……
t_en: They keep repeating themself like that...

t_ch: 言语不起作用…那就只能靠剑刃表露决意了。
t_en: If words won't work... then we can only express our resolve with our blades.

t_ch: 我们背负了太多人的命运和未来……
t_en: We shoulder the fates and futures of too many people...

t_ch: 我们…绝不可能在这里倒下！
t_en: We... will not fall here!

t_ch: 啊，千钧一发……
t_en: Phew, that was really close...

t_ch: 还远没到放松的时候…那盗火行者精通各种诡术，就算是万敌也不一定能限制住它的行动。
t_en: It's too early to relax... The Flame Reaver is a master in the art of deceit. Even Mydei may not be able to restrain them.

t_ch: 没想到我会两次把他一个人留在战场上…但现在不是考虑这个的时候。
t_en: I never thought I would leave him alone on the battlefield twice... But now isn't the time to be thinking about this.

t_ch: 缇宝没有跟来…她是打算留在上层帮助万敌么？
t_en: Tribbie didn't follow us... Does she intend to stay above to help Mydei?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你还跑得动吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you still run?

t_ch: 庇佑我们…天父，救救我们！
t_en: Protect us... Sky father, save us!

t_ch: 有人在呼救…那边！
t_en: Someone is calling for help... Over there!

t_ch: 黑潮造物在威胁公民——
t_en: The black tide creatures are threatening the people...

t_ch: 不能坐视不理…速战速决吧！
t_en: We can't just stand by and watch... Let's end this quickly!

t_ch: 各位，你们安全了…暂时。
t_en: Everyone, you're all safe... for now.

t_ch: 谢…谢谢你，白厄阁下！
t_en: Th—Thank you, Lord Phainon!

t_ch: 该感谢的另有其人。刚才那些黑潮造物，无法突破这道屏障……
t_en: It is someone else who deserves your thanks. Those black tide creatures just now couldn't breach this barrier...

t_ch: 这股能量很熟悉，近似风堇为人疗伤的明光术…只是更加强大。
t_en: This energy feels familiar, like the luminous arts that Hyacine uses to treat people... but it is much more powerful.

t_ch: 看来她成功了。
t_en: Looks like she did it.
...Yeah.

t_ch: 公民们！我和同伴们现在不能久留，在救兵赶来以前……
t_en: Citizens! My companions and I can't stay long. Before reinforcements arrive...

t_ch: 请你们不要踏出这道屏障半步——这是成为半神的风堇留下的神迹…请相信她的信念。
t_en: Please do not step out of this barrier. This is a miracle left by the demigod Hyacine... Please trust her conviction.

t_ch: 风堇小姐，也成为和阿格莱雅大人那样的半神了么……
t_en: Miss Hyacine has also become a demigod like Lady Aglaea...?

t_ch: 我们明白了…在等到你归来前，白厄阁下，我们绝不会离开她的庇护！
t_en: We understand... We will not leave her protection until you return, Lord Phainon!

t_ch: 我…不会给出虚假的承诺，或许我短时间内没法回到这里……
t_en: I... won't make empty promises. I might not be able to return in the near future...

t_ch: 但即便没有两全其美…我也一定会做出不负使命的选择。
t_en: But even if there's no perfect solution... I will make a choice that fulfills this mission.

t_ch: 我们相信你，白厄阁下！无论你做出什么选择……
t_en: We trust you, Lord Phainon! No matter what choice you make...

t_ch: 我们都会等待你归来！
t_en: We'll be waiting for your return!

t_ch: 哈托努斯！坚持住！
t_en: Chartonus! Hang in there!

t_ch: 啊…回归，白厄……
t_en: Ah... Returned, Phainon...

t_ch: 圣城…燃烧。抗争…我已尽力。
t_en: Burning... the holy city is. To resist... I did all I could.

t_ch: 你这把年纪已经不适合上前线了，大工匠…公民们呢？云石市集的情况如何？
t_en: You shouldn't be on the frontline at your age, Grand Craftsman... Where are the citizens? What's the situation at Marmoreal Market?

t_ch: 逃生…圣城卫士在组织。但…该逃向何处，无人知晓……
t_en: Organizing their escape... the holy city guards are. But... where to flee to, no one knows...

t_ch: 从天而降，虹色的屏障。保护了人们…但无法根除，恐惧。
t_en: Descended from the sky, the rainbow barrier did. Protected the people... but alleviated the fear, it could not.

t_ch: 恐怕这就是翁法罗斯的末世了，哈托努斯。只有一个办法能拯救家园……
t_en: I fear this is Amphoreus's end, Chartonus. There is only one way to save our home...

t_ch: 啊…终将实现，天父降下的神谕……
t_en: Ah... Finally come true, the sky father's prophecy...

t_ch: 去吧…奇迹，去创造。救世主…去成为。
t_en: Go... miracle, create it. Deliverer... you shall become.

t_ch: 一事…还有。
t_en: One more thing... there is.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>创世涡心…缇宁大人，在等待。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Waiting at the Vortex of Genesis... Lady Trinnon is.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒的火种，安全…她说。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Kephale's Coreflame is safe... she said.</color>

t_ch: 缇宁老师……
t_en: Trinnon...

t_ch: 黑潮生物…准备战斗！
t_en: Black tide creatures... Prepare for battle!

t_ch: 紧急…情况。交给我…怪物。
t_en: Urgent... the situation is. Leave them to me... the monsters.

t_ch: 但是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 已经死去…我本应。令我弥留…虹光的力量。
t_en: Died... I should have. Kept me here... the power of the rainbow light did.

t_ch: 但既然注定…死亡，无法逃脱……
t_en: But if destined... inescapable, death is...

t_ch: 何不…留下荣光？
t_en: Why not... leave behind some glory?

t_ch: 你这一生都在锻造荣光，老朋友——为别人，也为你自己。愿你在新世界里能度过没有战乱的一生。
t_en: You've been forging nothing but glory your entire life, old friend — for others, and for yourself. May you never see the slightest glimpse of war in the new world.

t_ch: 再见了，大工匠。
t_en: Farewell, Grand Craftsman.

t_ch: 我们走…去黄金裔浴场！
t_en: Let us depart... to the Chrysos Heirs' baths!

t_ch: 并非…为战斗而生，这双手……
t_en: For battle... these hands were not meant...

t_ch: 但，圣城的明天，若需由它守护……
t_en: But, if to protect the holy city's future, they are needed...

t_ch: 最后一刻…我将战至！
t_en: To the final moment... I will fight!

t_ch: 哈托努斯已经下定决心了——
t_en: Chartonus has made up his mind...

t_ch: 我们得继续前进，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: We have to keep moving forward, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 黄金裔浴场…空无一人。
t_en: The Chrysos Heirs' baths... Not a soul in here.

t_ch: 这里也有那些虚浮的建筑结构……
t_en: Those translucent structures are here too...

t_ch: 那些建筑物……
t_en: These buildings...

t_ch: 人家能感觉到…它们的记忆在流失。
t_en: I can feel it... Their memories are dissipating.

t_ch: 建筑…也有记忆？
t_en: Buildings... have memories too?

t_ch: 嗯…记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间。哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往世的痕迹。
t_en: Yes... the textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus. Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.

t_ch: 会蔓延到其它地方么？
t_en: Will this spread to other places?

t_ch: 人家也说不好…总之，感觉很不妙。
t_en: I'm not sure... In any case, none of this feels right.

t_ch: 记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间…哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往事的痕迹。
t_en: The textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus... Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.

t_ch: 这里没有受困的公民，也没有黑潮造物的影子…我们没理由在此逗留。
t_en: There are no citizens trapped here, nor any signs of black tide creatures... We have no reason to linger here.

t_ch: 下楼吧…浴宫就在不远处了。
t_en: Let's head downstairs... The bath chamber isn't far away.

t_ch: 它——它们追上来了！
t_en: Th—They caught up to us!

t_ch: 难不成，万敌……
t_en: Don't tell me that Mydei...
Tsk...

t_ch: 能正面打倒它吗？
t_en: Can we defeat them head-on?

t_ch: 你们走，我来断后！
t_en: You guys go ahead. I'll shore up the rear!

t_ch: 白厄，带着{NICKNAME}赶去创世涡心吧。我留在这里拖住它。
t_en: Phainon, take {NICKNAME} to the Vortex of Genesis. I will stay here and hold them off.

t_ch: 丹恒，你……
t_en: Dan Heng, you...

t_ch: 别犹豫，白厄——你还肩负再创世的使命。
t_en: Don't hesitate, Phainon. You still shoulder the mission of the Era Nova.

t_ch: 前方不知是否还有盗火行者的分身…{NICKNAME}，护在白厄身边吧，以保不备。
t_en: We don't know if the Flame Reaver has any clones up ahead... {NICKNAME}, stay close to Phainon and keep him safe.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯人总把「宿命」挂在嘴边…那「开拓」的宿命，就是总会把每个世界的存亡与我们自身系在一起。
t_en: Amphoreans often speak of "destiny"... The destiny of the Trailblaze is to bind the life and death of every world to our own existence.

t_ch: 如此仓促的道别…我不接受。
t_en: Such a hasty farewell... I won't allow it.

t_ch: 这不会是道别。放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
t_en: This isn't farewell. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.

t_ch: 列车组的大家都在等我们回去！
t_en: Everyone in the Crew is still waiting for our return!

t_ch: 我没打算和谁永别。放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
t_en: I don't intend to say goodbye forever to anyone. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.

t_ch: 我也和你一起留下…
t_en: I'll stay together with you...

t_ch: 总要有人争取时间。
t_en: Someone has to buy time.

t_ch: 我没打算和谁永别，{NICKNAME}——放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
t_en: It's not goodbye forever, {NICKNAME}. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.

t_ch: 时间…无多……
t_en: Time... running out...

t_ch: 一切…都将归零。
t_en: Everything... will be reset.

t_ch: 你要说到做到，丹恒……
t_en: You better keep your word, Dan Heng...

t_ch: 绝不能死在这里！
t_en: You cannot die here!

t_ch: 有流水之处，我便能借它之力涤荡恶浊。
t_en: Wherever there's flowing water, I can harness its power to purge the filth.

t_ch: 这力量…陌生……
t_en: This power... Unfamiliar...

t_ch: 你是…何者…？
t_en: Who... are you...?

t_ch: 哪怕只是一介过客，也会不惜以生命守护脚下陌生的世界…这是「开拓」逃不开的命途轨迹。
t_en: Even if I were just a passing traveler, I would not hesitate to lay down my life and protect the unfamiliar world beneath my feet... This is the destined course that a Trailblazer cannot escape.

t_ch: 我是一名「无名客」，而我要做的事……
t_en: I am a Nameless, and what I'm going to do...

t_ch: 就是捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望。
t_en: ...is defend all the hopes that are on the verge of fading away.

t_ch: 必须尽快赶去创世涡心！
t_en: We have to get to the Vortex of Genesis quickly!

t_ch: 白厄阁下！
t_en: Lord Phainon!

t_ch: 终于，你们回来了！
t_en: Finally, you're all back!

t_ch: 即便是在如此绝望的时刻，你们还是遵守了与我的约定…我无以言谢。
t_en: Even in such desperate times, you still managed to keep your promise to me... I am grateful beyond words.

t_ch: 白厄，这是……
t_en: Phainon, what is this...

t_ch: 盗火行者在城内作乱，他还有诸多分身——泽弗，请找人通知克拉特鲁斯，让他带着最精英的卫士守在城内的关口——
t_en: The Flame Reaver is wreaking havoc in the city, and they still have many clones. Zeph, please get someone to inform Krateros, and have him lead the most elite guards to defend the city's passages...

t_ch: 直到我完成归还仪式前…请尽力营救城中的民众。
t_en: Until I complete the Coreflame ritual... please do everything you can to rescue the citizens in the city.

t_ch: 遵命，白厄阁下。
t_en: Understood, Lord Phainon.

t_ch: 尼莫西妮——有几位公民被困在了生命花园，暂时躲在风堇的壁障下。你能调派些人手去疏散他们么？
t_en: Mnemosyne... Several citizens are trapped in the Garden of Life, and are temporarily seeking refuge under Hyacine's barrier. Can you dispatch some people to evacuate them?

t_ch: 虽然…我也不知道该把他们送到哪去。
t_en: Though... I also don't know where to shelter them.

t_ch: 交给我们吧，白厄阁下——你只要专注于自己的使命就好。
t_en: Leave this to us, Lord Phainon. Just focus on your own mission.

t_ch: 嗯。至于{NICKNAME}和丹恒——就交给你们亲自护送了。
t_en: All right. As for {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, I'll also leave them to you.

t_ch: 这到底是怎么回事…
t_en: What in the world is going on...

t_ch: 你有什么事瞒着我吗，白厄？
t_en: Are you hiding something from me, Phainon?

t_ch: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}。这次是我自作主张了。
t_en: My apologies, {NICKNAME}. I acted on my own this time.

t_ch: 征伐艾格勒以前，我做了最坏的准备。即便奥赫玛终有一日会被黑潮攻陷……
t_en: I prepared for the worst before the fight against Aquila. Even if there came a day when Okhema was taken by the black tide...

t_ch: 但只要击败了艾格勒，令天空的诅咒不再…至少你和丹恒还有机会安全回家。
t_en: As long as we defeated Aquila, lifting the sky's curse... you and Dan Heng would at least have a chance to get home safely.

t_ch: 你…早就计划好了？
t_en: You... already made plans?

t_ch: 嗯。我知道你们会反对，所以才没提前通气，抱歉。
t_en: Yes. I knew you'd object, so I didn't inform you beforehand. My apologies.

t_ch: 行百里者半九十…
t_en: The final lap is always the hardest...

t_ch: 抱歉，我知道你们不喜欢半途而废，所以才没提前通气。
t_en: Sorry, I know you must dislike leaving things unfinished, which is why I didn't inform you beforehand.

t_ch: 进度条<unbreak>95%</unbreak>了，不让看结局？
t_en: The progress bar is already at <unbreak>95%</unbreak>, and you're leaving me on a cliffhanger?

t_ch: 我知道这很难接受…但即便要受一辈子埋怨，我也必须对你们负责。
t_en: I know this is hard to accept... but even if it means being resented for the rest of my life, I still have to be responsible for you.

t_ch: 你和丹恒教会了我何为「开拓」的精神，伙计。我做过最正确的决定，就是跟从了自己的直觉，选择相信你们。
t_en: Friend, you and Dan Heng taught me the spirit of Trailblazing. The best decision I ever made in my life was when I followed my intuition and chose to trust you.

t_ch: 丹恒和我讲了很多「无名客」的冒险故事，其中有两个最让我印象深刻：「贝洛伯格」和「匹诺康尼」——
t_en: Dan Heng told me many stories about the adventures of the Nameless. Two of them left a deep impression on me: "Belobog" and "Penacony"...

t_ch: 前一个故事告诉我，一个世界的命运应当由它的子民来左右。而你们——哪怕甘愿为了陌生的世界出生入死——最后还是要踏上旅程，前往下一个有待拯救的世界。
t_en: The first story taught me that the fate of a world should be in the hands of its people. And... even if the Nameless are willing to risk everything for an unfamiliar world, in the end you still have to embark on a new journey and go to the next world that needs saving.

t_ch: 因为那就是你们的使命…你们踏上的「命途」。
t_en: Because that's your mission... the Path you follow.

t_ch: 而在第二个故事里，丹恒和我讲到了那几位为「监狱星」付出了生命的无名客。我很清楚，你们两个甘愿为翁法罗斯做出同样的选择。
t_en: In the second story, Dan Heng told me about the few Nameless who sacrificed their lives for the "prison world." I know very well that the two of you are willing to make the same choice for Amphoreus.

t_ch: 在听到那几个故事以后，我也私自下定了决心——
t_en: After hearing those stories, I made up my mind...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我绝不会让你们的旅途在这里画上句号，{NICKNAME}。</color>在翁法罗斯人从未触及的天外，还有很多人在等着你们回家。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I won't let your journey end here, {NICKNAME}.</color> Somewhere beyond the sky, where Amphoreans have never reached, there are many people waiting for you to come home.

t_ch: 神谕模糊不清，即便归还了第十二颗火种，也没人知道「再创世」究竟会以怎样的面目显现…更遑论「奇迹」是否能眷顾两位天外来客。
t_en: The prophecy has always remained shrouded in ambiguity even if the twelfth Coreflame is returned, no one knows how the Era Nova will manifest... let alone if the miracle will extend its favor to two visitors from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 在踏入未知的命运之前，我能为你们做到的最后一件事…就是帮助你们回到家人的身边。
t_en: Before stepping into a fate unknown, the last thing I can do... is help you return to your family.

t_ch: 且不论神谕，我们现在也回不去。
t_en: And even if we ignore the prophecy, we can't go back now.

t_ch: 请别担心，{NICKNAME}阁下。白厄大人此前已经委托了来古士议员，修好了两位的载具。
t_en: Please don't worry, {NICKNAME}. Lord Phainon has already entrusted Elder Lygus to fix your transport.

t_ch: 缇宁大人的百界门就开在奥赫玛的城外大道，{NICKNAME}阁下。
t_en: Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is open on the main street outside Okhema's walls, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 对不起，向你们提出如此过分的请求。但我们活在一个不完美的时代里…不存在两全其美的选择。
t_en: I'm sorry for making such an unreasonable request of you all. But we live in an imperfect age... where there is never a perfect choice.

t_ch: 我有权见证这场开拓的结局。
t_en: I have the right to witness the ending of this Trailblaze.

t_ch: 英雄…不需要独自承担一切。
t_en: A hero... doesn't have to bear everything alone.

t_ch: 希望有朝一日，我们能在星宿的见证下重聚…到时候，我们再摆一席迟到的庆功宴吧。
t_en: One day, I hope we will reunite under the constellations... When that time comes, we can hold a belated victory feast. How about that?

t_ch: 你变得不像你自己了，白厄。
t_en: You've changed into someone different from yourself, Phainon.

t_ch: 别想用这种方法阻止我回来。
t_en: Don't try to stop me from coming back like that.

t_ch: 我们每个人都有抉择的权力。假如无法接受我代替你们做出的决定……
t_en: Every one of us has the right to make our own choices. If you can't accept my decision on your behalf...

t_ch: …那就用你自己的选择开辟出新的道路吧——这是你最擅长的事，对么？
t_en: ...Then use your choice to open up a new path — that's what you're best at, right?

t_ch: 但无论如何…丹恒现在还在苦苦支撑。别让他等太久，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Regardless... Dan Heng is still holding on for his life... Don't keep him waiting too long, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 灵水…干涸了？
t_en: The spirit water... has dried up?

t_ch: 该死！为什么处处都是阻碍……
t_en: Blast! Why is nothing going right...

t_ch: 冷静下来…也许还有别的入口。离这里最近的，其他黄金裔的祭仪水盆……
t_en: Calm down... There might be another way in. The closest ritual basin, the other Chrysos Heirs'...

t_ch: …小白。
t_en: ...Snowy.

t_ch: …缇宁老师！
t_en: ...Trinnon!

t_ch: 我以为你会在创世涡心等我。你还好吗？
t_en: I thought you'd be waiting at the Vortex of Genesis. Are you all right?

t_ch: 奥赫玛的夜幕降临时…所有的灵水也都随之枯涸了。*我们*猜到你会着急，所以才提前来这里等着。
t_en: When Okhema's night descended... all the spirit water dried up along with it. We anticipated that you'd be on edge, so we came ahead to wait for you.

t_ch: 呵…你们一直是最了解我的人。
t_en: Heh... You've always been the ones who knew me best.

t_ch: 刻法勒的火种…你知道它在哪儿吗？
t_en: Kephale's Coreflame... You know where it is?

t_ch: 嗯。小飞儿，她把火种保护得很好…没人能猜到它被藏在了哪里。
t_en: Yes. Little Ciphy protected the Coreflame well... No one would be able to guess where she stashed it.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯——出来吧？
t_en: Bartholos! You can come on out!

t_ch: …桀桀桀！总算不用装成个信封了，可憋死我了！
t_en: ...Heeheehee! I don't have to pretend to be an envelope anymore! That was suffocating!

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯？！这究竟是……
t_en: Bartholos!? What in the world...

t_ch: 喂喂，你现在态度可得放尊重点呀，小鬼！因为整个世界都在觊觎的那颗火种……
t_en: Hey, you'd better watch your tone, brat! That Coreflame that the entire world is after...

t_ch: …现在可就躺在本大爷深不见底的胃囊里呀！
t_en: ...is currently nestled in the depths of my bottomless tummy!

t_ch: 这的确…在意料之外。
t_en: This certainly was... unexpected.

t_ch: 哈？你的反应未免太冷静了，这和我设想的完全不一样嘛！
t_en: Huh? Your reaction's too composed. It's completely different from what I was anticipating!

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯…小白还不知道奥赫玛永昼的真相。
t_en: Bartholos... Snowy still doesn't know the truth behind Okhema's eternal daylight.

t_ch: 啊…对哦。那你可要站稳听好咯，小鬼！
t_en: Ah... you're right. Then you'd better strap in and listen up, brat!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>赛法利娅那丫头，用一个伟大的谎言骗过了整个翁法罗斯——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That girl, Cifera, spun a grand lie that deceived all of Amphoreus...</color>

t_ch: 她骗过了你们所有人，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们相信刻法勒背上那个大球会永远照亮奥赫玛……</color>
t_en: She tricked all of you <color=#dbc291ff>into believing that that giant ball on Kephale's back would cast light over Okhema forever...</color>

t_ch: 除此之外…桀桀桀，她还骗过了那个愚蠢的晋升试炼，<color=#dbc291ff>让本大爷，伟大的{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…活了下来！</color>
t_en: Not just that... Heeheehee, she even managed to fool that dumb ascension trial, <color=#dbc291ff>and allowed me, the great {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... to survive!</color>

t_ch: …喂？小鬼？
t_en: ...Hey, brat?

t_ch: 你…怎么还是没反应呀？可恶！一点都不有趣，本大爷太失望了！
t_en: You... still no reaction from you? Dang it! You're no fun at all. I'm sorely disappointed!

t_ch: 所以，千年以来…维系奥赫玛永昼的并非刻法勒的神迹，而是赛飞儿以「诡计」的神权编织的谎言……
t_en: So, for the last thousand years... what maintained Okhema's eternal daylight was not Kephale's miracle, but Cipher's lie woven using the divine authority of Trickery...

t_ch: 但现在，谎言破碎了。那就代表……
t_en: But now, the lie has come undone. Which means...

t_ch: 你没猜错…赛法利娅已经逝去了。她所有的谎言，如今也都灰飞云散了啊。
t_en: You didn't guess wrong... Cifera has already passed, and all her lies have scattered to the winds like ash.

t_ch: 但你刚刚才说过，你——扎格列斯——同样是靠着赛飞儿的谎言维系生命的。假如她已经……
t_en: But you just said, you — Zagreus — relied on Cipher's lie to keep living. If she is already...

t_ch: 桀桀桀…看来你的机灵程度也有限呀，小鬼。别忘了，本大爷可是翁法罗斯的十二泰坦之一……
t_en: Heeheehee... Guess you're not as smart as I thought, brat. Don't forget. I am one of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus...

t_ch: 而我胃囊里的这颗火种…<color=#dbc291ff>不正是用来维系泰坦生命和神性的核心嘛？</color>
t_en: And this Coreflame in my belly... <color=#dbc291ff>Is it not the core that maintains a Titan's life and divinity?</color>
Ah...

t_ch: 所以，你…打算就这么把火种交给我们？
t_en: So, you're... going to hand the Coreflame over to us, just like that?

t_ch: 桀桀桀…正是如此！怎么样，还不快谢过本大爷？
t_en: Heeheehee... Just so! How about it? Let's hear some groveling gratitude, eh?

t_ch: 为什么？神话中…扎格列斯是最胆小偷生的泰坦。
t_en: Why? In the myths... Zagreus was the most cowardly and shameful of the Titans.

t_ch: 哎，少拿那些编纂出来的故事诋毁本大爷！我的追求，可比区区一条小命远大得多……
t_en: Hey, stop slandering me with those fabricated tales! My pursuits are far greater than one measly life...

t_ch: 告诉你吧！本泰坦毕生所求…就是跟赛飞儿一起，编织出这世上最伟大的诡计！
t_en: Let me tell you then! My lifelong ambition... was to work with Cipher to conjure the greatest trick in the world!

t_ch: 假设这个世界的未来存在一亿种可能性，不管怎么看，那其中的九千九百九十九万九千九百九十九种都指向了毁灭的结局……
t_en: Assume this world holds a hundred million possibilities, and no matter how one looks at it, ninety-nine million, nine hundred ninety-nine thousand, nine hundred and ninety-nine of them all point to outcomes of certain destruction...

t_ch: 但是！凭着这一桩精妙的诡计，我们骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒、灾难，实现了那亿分之一的可能……
t_en: But! With an exquisitely brilliant scheme, we fooled all the fools, villains, and disasters of this world, and achieved that one-in-a-hundred-million possibility...

t_ch: 这…就是我穷极一生，不惜变成这副模样，也想实现的「神迹」呀！
t_en: This... is the "miracle" I wished to achieve in my life's pursuit, even at the cost of turning into this!

t_ch: 把火种拿去吧，小鬼！去完成你的使命！
t_en: Take the Coreflame with you, brat! Go finish your mission!

t_ch: 记好咯——拯救了翁法罗斯的，不是刻法勒那个呆子的恩泽，也不是欧洛尼斯那个娃娃的呓语……
t_en: Remember this well... What saved Amphoreus wasn't the grace of that simpleton Kephale, nor was it the babbling of that child Oronyx...

t_ch: …而是本大爷遭世人唾弃的神力…还有一个猫耳小贼维系了千年的谎言！
t_en: ...It was the divine power of me, scorned by all... and the millennium-long lie of a cat-eared thief!

t_ch: 扎格列斯掏出了藏于胃囊中的，属于刻法勒的火种。
t_en: Zagreus takes out the Coreflame that belonged to Kephale, which was hidden in their stomach.

t_ch: 它被减削至贼灵形态的神躯逐渐化作尘土消散，不羁的笑声亦随风远去……
t_en: Their divine body, reduced to the form of a Spirithief, disappears into dust. Their unbridled laughter fades away in the wind...

t_ch: 纷争。死亡。诡计……
t_en: Strife. Death. Trickery...

t_ch: 原来那些被视为灾厄的符号…也能在救世的故事里留下印记。
t_en: So those signs deemed as harbingers of calamity... will also leave behind marks in the tale of deliverance.

t_ch: 如此一来，最后的一颗火种就能归位啦。
t_en: With this, the final Coreflame can be returned to its rightful place.

t_ch: 圣城中的灵水已经干涸…不过，*我们*可以尽力突破法吉娜祭司的封印法术…用「百界门」把你送入创世涡心。
t_en: The spirit water in the holy city has all dried up... We can try to break the sealing magic of Phagousa's priests... and use the Century Gate to send you into the Vortex of Genesis.

t_ch: 但…那恐怕会耗尽我们身上剩下的雅努斯神力。后面的事就都靠你啦，小白。
t_en: But... that will likely exhaust any remaining power of Janus that we have. After that, the rest is up to you, Snowy.

t_ch: 离别…我已经快要对它感到麻木了。到了这个时候…我连一句干涩的道别都说不出口。
t_en: Farewells... I've almost grown numb to them at this point. Right now... I can't even utter a plain goodbye.

t_ch: 小白……
t_en: Snowy...

t_ch: 别担心，缇宁老师。我已经不再是被阿格莱雅带回奥赫玛的那具空壳了。
t_en: Don't worry, Trinnon. I'm no longer the empty shell that Aglaea brought back to Okhema.

t_ch: 每一位没能走到最后的同伴，他们救世的信念都会成为我的一部分，拼凑出我一度丢失的灵魂。
t_en: For every companion who couldn't reach the end, their conviction to save the world became a part of me, piecing together the soul I once lost.

t_ch: 我失去了故乡，但你、阿格莱雅、还有所有其他人，共同为我编织出了第二个家园。
t_en: I lost my home village, but you, Aglaea, and everyone else created a second home for me.

t_ch: 如今，这个家园也危在旦夕…那就该轮到我回报你们的馈赠，去创造一个能承载所有愿望的新世界了。
t_en: Now that this home is also in danger... it is my turn to repay your kindness and create a new world that can carry everyone's wishes.

t_ch: 希望在那个新世界里，会有一轮崭新的朝阳升起——为所有人带去一个又一个黎明。
t_en: I hope that, in that new world, a new sun will rise, bringing one dawn after another to all.

t_ch: 你已经长成了阿雅期望中的样子呀，小白。
t_en: Snowy, you've grown into the person Agy always dreamed of.

t_ch: 的确，我们不需要在这里道别……
t_en: Indeed, we don't need to say goodbye here...

t_ch: 因为，无需预言的确证，*我们*也有自信断言…你一定会成为那一轮朝阳。
t_en: Because, even without the prophecy, we have the confidence to say... you will become that rising sun.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而我们所有人…都一定会在「明天」再度相见。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And all of us... will see each other again "tomorrow."</color>

t_ch: 输送平台的路径被碎石阻断了……
t_en: The transport platform's route is blocked by rubble...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}——帮我们争取时间吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Help buy us some time!

t_ch: 路径上的碎石都清空了。
t_en: The rubble blocking the path has been cleared.

t_ch: 干得好，我们下山。
t_en: Good job. Now we can get off the mountain.

t_ch: 黑潮造物…在黎明云崖？！
t_en: A black tide creature... at Dawncloud!?

t_ch: 糟了，城中的公民！
t_en: Oh no, the people in the city!

t_ch: 必须弄清他们是从哪里涌入城市的……
t_en: We must find out where they breached the city from...

t_ch: 缇宝老师——请一定撑到我们回来！
t_en: Tribbie! Please hold on till we get back!

t_ch: 还有敌人，下面的情况不容乐观……
t_en: More enemies. It doesn't look great down there...

t_ch: 敢拦路的家伙…都来会会「侵晨」的剑锋吧。
t_en: Anyone who dares stand in our way... will get a taste of Dawnmaker's edge.

t_ch: 风堇…她成功了吗？
t_en: Hyacine... Did she make it?

t_ch: 她疗愈世界的信念那么强大……
t_en: Her will to heal the world is so strong...

t_ch: 如果成功，我们一定会感知到的。
t_en: We'll definitely sense it if she's succeeded.

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...
...A "Cleaner"!?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「以祷言之力，填补秘锁之影——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Through the power of prayer, fill the shadow of the seal..."</color>

t_ch: 设计这机关的人肯定想不到…有朝一日，拥有欧洛尼斯神力之人会亲手将它解开。
t_en: The person who designed this mechanism would never have guessed that... one day, someone with the divine power of Oronyx could unlock it with their own hands.

t_ch: …成功了！
t_en: ...We did it!

t_ch: 带上火种，抓紧下山吧！
t_en: Take the Coreflame and let's hurry down the mountain!

t_ch: 呵…呵呵……
t_en: Hah... Hahah...

t_ch: 为、为什么？！人家以为奥赫玛是安全的！
t_en: Wh—Why!? I thought Okhema was safe!

t_ch: 恐怕这世上已经没有安全的角落了！
t_en: I fear no corner of this world is safe right now!

t_ch: 它的目标一定是火种——我们必须抢先一步！
t_en: Their objective must be the Coreflame — we have to beat them to the punch!

t_ch: 雅努斯密径——必须靠它穿过神界湖！
t_en: Janus's Hidden Passage — we have to use it to cross Theosphere Lake!

t_ch: 它迟早会追上来——
t_en: They will catch up to us sooner or later...

t_ch: 继续跑，别停下！
t_en: Keep running. Don't stop!

t_ch: 是他！白厄阁下！
t_en: It's him! Lord Phainon!

t_ch: 究…究竟发生了什么？！
t_en: Wh... What in the world happened!?

t_ch: 退回神殿里去！保护好你们的家人、朋友！
t_en: Retreat to the temple! Protect your family and friends!

t_ch: 混乱很快就会结束…我向你们保证！
t_en: The chaos will soon cease... I promise you!

t_ch: 那道虹色的屏障……
t_en: That rainbow barrier...

t_ch: 是风堇的力量么？
t_en: Is that Hyacine's power?

t_ch: 市集的人们…或许也在经受苦难。
t_en: The people in the market... must also be suffering.

t_ch: 希望风堇来得及保护他们……
t_en: I hope Hyacine can protect them in time...

t_ch: …哈托努斯！
t_en: ...Chartonus!

t_ch: 快，去看看他的情况！
t_en: Quick, let's go check on him!

t_ch: 哈托努斯说，<color=#dbc291ff>缇宁老师有火种的消息——</color>
t_en: Chartonus said that <color=#dbc291ff>Trinnon had news of the Coreflame...</color>

t_ch: 果然…赛飞儿小姐没有辜负使命！
t_en: As expected... Miss Cipher did not fail her mission!

t_ch: 浴场的水体，在用我难以理解的方式传达悲恸和绝望……
t_en: The baths' waters are conveying sorrow and despair in ways I can barely comprehend...

t_ch: 隐约有种不好的预感。
t_en: I'm getting a vague sense of foreboding here.

t_ch: 跟我来。
t_en: Follow me.

t_ch: 大家，可以再跑快些吗？
t_en: Everyone, can we run faster?

t_ch: 人家又有些…不祥的预感！
t_en: I've got a bad feeling!

t_ch: (「记忆」命途拥有让一个区域内时间暂停的能力，或许能帮上忙……)
t_en: (The Path of "Remembrance" holds the power to suspend time in a given area... Maybe that could help...)

t_ch: 「清洗者」的首领于此陷入永不苏醒的沉眠，她的死相平静得令人愤懑。
t_en: The leader of the "Cleaners" fell into an eternal slumber, her death so peaceful that it fomented resentment.

t_ch: 或许在遥远的西风尽头，亦有公正的律法能为这位元老的灵魂断罪。
t_en: Perhaps, at the distant end of the west wind, there will be a just law that can convict the sins infesting this elder's soul.

t_ch: 随着「理性」与「死亡」的火种得到归还，眼下还需讨伐的泰坦只剩下{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}。白厄委托我们复现时空，反复挑战盗火行者磨练自身。逐火之旅成功在即，圣城却异变突生……
t_en: Following the return of the Coreflames of Reason and Death, {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} is the only Titan that we still need to campaign against. Phainon asks us to recreate the past, and he repeatedly challenges the Flame Reaver to hone his abilities. The Flame-Chase Journey's triumphant conclusion draws nigh, yet a sudden disturbance occurs in the holy city...

t_ch: 阿格莱雅借元老院与清洗者之手，以自己的落幕为逐火扫清前路。悲痛之余，白厄接过领袖职责，发表演讲团结民众；而赛飞儿也受命回城，承诺将在逐火小队离城时守护{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
t_en: Using the Council of Elders and the Cleaners, Aglaea made sure that her fall paved the road forward for the Flame-Chase. Amidst his grief, Phainon takes up the mantle of leadership, giving a speech to unite the people. Cipher also returns on a mission, promising to protect {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame while the Flame-Chase party is away from the city.

t_ch: 在昏光庭院的天空末裔——风堇的帮助下，众人登上艾格勒的空中堡垒。风堇决心完成代代相传的使命，却发现「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝讨伐艾格勒的伟业，竟是一段染血的谎言。
t_en: With the help of the Twilight Courtyard's last descendant of the sky, Hyacine, the party ascends to Aquila's flying fortress. Hyacine resolves to fulfill the duty passed down over generations of her family, only to discover that the glorious feat of Seliose the Daythunder Knight campaigning against Aquila was nothing more than a blood-stained lie.

t_ch: 与此同时，赛飞儿在龙骸古城与循火种而来的盗火行者周旋许久，最终不敌遭其杀害。但她早已设计将刻法勒火种交予贼灵巴特鲁斯，命它伺机将火种交付白厄等人。
t_en: At the same time in the city of the dead dragon's bones, Cipher contends with the Flame Reaver who comes seeking the Coreflame. Though she holds out for some time, she is no match and is slain in the end. But she had already given Kephale's Coreflame to Spirithief Bartholos, ordering them to wait for an opportunity to deliver the Coreflame to Phainon and the others.

t_ch: 逐火小队齐心作战，终于击败了人神合一的「天空」泰坦。众人正欲逃离晨昏之眼，黎明机器却在此时突然熄灭，风堇不得不提前归还火种，并留在天空承载神权、庇佑民众。
t_en: The Flame-Chasers fight together to defeat the Sky Titan, which has become a combined being of the god and a mortal. As they are trying to escape from the Eye of Twilight, the Dawn Device suddenly goes out, and Hyacine is forced to return the Coreflame early and remain in the sky to bear divine authority, becoming the protector of the people.

t_ch: 伴随着赛飞儿的离去，「诡计」神力消散，因其谎言得以维续的奥赫玛千年黎明结束了。圣城遭到黑潮无情入侵，强大的盗火行者也步步紧逼。
t_en: Following Cipher's death, the divine power of Trickery dissipates, and the thousand-year dawn of Okhema that is sustained by her lie comes to an end. The holy city is met with the merciless invasion of the black tide, as the powerful Flame Reaver moves in ever closer.

t_ch: 危急时刻，万敌、遐蝶、缇宝与缇宁、哈托努斯、圣城卫士、丹恒…所有人赌上性命，只为了救世主能够完成使命。最终，在安顿好我后，白厄独自踏入了创世涡心……
t_en: At this moment of crisis, Mydei, Castorice, Tribbie and Trinnon, Chartonus, the Holy City Guards, and Dan Heng... All lay their lives on the line so that the Deliverer would have a chance to complete his mission. After making sure that I would remain safe, Phainon enters the Vortex of Genesis alone...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请跟紧我们，去同丹恒大人会合。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, please stay close to us. We need to rendezvous with Lord Dan Heng.

t_ch: 我二人定将不遗余力，为您开道！
t_en: We will do everything in our power to clear the path for you!

t_ch: 找到他了，丹恒阁下！
t_en: There he is! Lord Dan Heng!

t_ch: 快！我们去支援他！
t_en: Quick! We must assist him!

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}？！你…这是怎么回事？白厄在哪？
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}!? What are you doing here? Where's Phainon?

t_ch: 说来话长，先应付那家伙吧！
t_en: It's a long story. Let's deal with that guy first!

t_ch: 该离开了，丹恒！
t_en: We need to go, Dan Heng!

t_ch: 我们应白厄阁下的请求，要不计代价护送两位平安离开！
t_en: We are under Lord Phainon's orders to escort both of you to safety, no matter the cost!

t_ch: 这里交给我和圣城卫士…泽弗，你带他们走！
t_en: Leave this to me and the Holy City Guards... Zeph, take them and go!

t_ch: 等等，尼莫西妮——
t_en: Wait, Mnemosyne—

t_ch: 那黑衣剑客似乎不太对劲？
t_en: That black-clad swordmaster... something seems off.

t_ch: 从刚才的某一刻起，它就忽然陷入僵直，一动不动。
t_en: At some point earlier, they suddenly froze in place... not moving at all.

t_ch: 像是…某种预兆。
t_en: Like... some kind of omen.

t_ch: 抓住机会，干掉它！
t_en: Now's our chance to take them down!

t_ch: 不行，别贸然接近！那家伙外溢的黑焰十分滚烫。虽然不知道发生了什么，但离开才是上策。
t_en: No, don't get too close! That thing's black flames are burning hot. I don't know what's happening, but leaving is the best option.

t_ch: 抓紧时间，离开吧。
t_en: No time to waste, let's get out of here.

t_ch: 嗯。虽然不知道发生了什么，但眼下撤离才是上策。
t_en: Right. We don't know exactly what's happening, but retreating is the safest choice right now.

t_ch: 不知是哪位半神为我们降下了奇迹…两位，请跟我们走吧！
t_en: I don't know which demigod graced us with this miracle... Please, come with us!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，别贸然接近它！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, don't get too close!

t_ch: 那家伙外溢的黑焰，十分危险。
t_en: That thing's black flames are extremely dangerous.

t_ch: 盗火行者没有追来…真的是某种奇迹显灵了么？
t_en: The Flame Reaver isn't pursuing us... Could this really be some kind of divine intervention?

t_ch: 两位阁下，此地不宜久留。缇宁大人的百界门就在城外大道——继续前进吧。
t_en: We can't stay here for long. Lady Trinnon's Century Gate is just outside the city — let's keep moving.

t_ch: 我还是觉得应该有人留下…
t_en: I still feel like someone should stay behind...

t_ch: 我同意你的看法。但白厄…一定也经过了许多挣扎才做出这番安排。
t_en: I agree. But Phainon... he must have struggled a lot before making this decision.

t_ch: 这样…真的算「开拓」吗？
t_en: Is this... really what Trailblazing is supposed to be?

t_ch: 我们在翁法罗斯的经历远超预想，如果只是为了补充燃料，目的肯定达成了。但你说得没错……
t_en: Our experience in Amphoreus has far exceeded expectations. If our goal was just to replenish fuel, then mission accomplished. But you're right...

t_ch: 就这样离开，我会十分遗憾。
t_en: Leaving like this... I'll definitely regret it.

t_ch: 我…其实也一样。应当有人留下，和白厄一起完成「再创世」。
t_en: I... feel the same. Someone should stay and help Phainon complete Era Nova.

t_ch: 先和列车取得联系，再讨论下一步行动吧。这是最稳妥的做法，我们也需要更多信息。
t_en: For now, let's get back in contact with the Express and plan our next move. That's the safest course of action. We need more information.

t_ch: 关于此事，我还有一个提议——
t_en: On that note, I have a proposal—

t_ch: …谁！谁在那边？！
t_en: ...Who's there!?

t_ch: 希望能传达给两位「无名客」。
t_en: I hope to convey a message to the two "Nameless."

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆先生？！
t_en: Mr. Screwllum!?

t_ch: 是谁？！退下，我命令你，保持十步距离！
t_en: Who are you!? Stand down! I order you to maintain a distance of ten paces!

t_ch: 冷静，卫士！面前这位不是敌人。
t_en: It's okay, guard. This one is not our enemy.

t_ch: 许久未见，星穹列车的无名客。
t_en: It has been a while, Nameless of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 我很庆幸能及时赶到，阻止那名黑衣人对二位做出更多伤害。
t_en: I'm glad I arrived in time to stop that black-clad one from harming you further.

t_ch: 原来是你。
t_en: So, it was you.

t_ch: 很高兴见到熟悉的面孔。
t_en: It's good to see some familiar faces.

t_ch: 能发现两位的行踪，我和黑塔女士也倍感幸运，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
t_en: It was fortunate we found you in time. Madam Herta and I were both quite relieved, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 没想到列车组找了天才当外援…
t_en: Never thought the Express Crew would bring in a genius for backup...

t_ch: 正是。黑塔女士邀请我与诸位无名客进行了会晤，请放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
t_en: Indeed. Madam Herta invited me to meet with you Nameless. Rest assured, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 状况越来越让人摸不着头脑了…
t_en: Things are getting more confusing by the minute...

t_ch: 请您放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。黑塔女士同我正是为了翁法罗斯而来。
t_en: Rest assured, {NICKNAME}. Madam Herta and I have come here for the sake of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 两位认识这个…安提基色拉人吗？他是来古士议员的同族？
t_en: You two know this... Antikytheran? Does he come from the same people as Councilor Lygus?

t_ch: 放心，卫士。眼前这位先生是来接应的「开拓」盟友。介意让我们单独聊聊吗？
t_en: Don't worry, guard. This gentleman is an ally of the Trailblaze. Would you mind giving us a moment to speak in private?

t_ch: 当然。我们会在一旁等候，请注意安全。
t_en: Of course. We'll wait nearby. Please stay safe.

t_ch: 我充分理解各位的处境，眼下我能做的，也只有暂时冻结那名黑衣人的行动。时间有限。所以，我将以最简洁的措辞归结来意——
t_en: I fully understand your situation. For now, the only thing I can do is temporarily freeze that black-clad one in place. Time is limited. So, I'll keep this brief—

t_ch: 两位所在之地，翁法罗斯，<color=#dbc291ff>是一个由数据和忆质构建的世界，一位星神的实验场。</color>
t_en: The place where you stand, Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>is a world constructed from data and memoria, an experimental field of a certain Aeon.</color>

t_ch: 而如今，这个与世隔绝的沙盒世界正在急速坠入第三道命途——<color=#dbc291ff>「毁灭」。</color>
t_en: And now, this isolated sandbox world is rapidly falling into a third Path — <color=#dbc291ff>Destruction</color>.
Destruction...

t_ch: 结论：假如放任翁法罗斯的进程不受限制地推移……
t_en: Conclusion: If Amphoreus continues unchecked on this course...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>一位「绝灭大君」将完成进化、蜕变，自汹涌的潮汐中诞生。你我熟知的银河，将承受不可逆转的打击。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A Lord Ravager will complete its evolution and metamorphosis, and emerge from the surging tides. The cosmos as we know it will suffer irreversible consequences.</color>

t_ch: 绝灭大君…类似「幻胧」吗？
t_en: A Lord Ravager... Like Phantylia?

t_ch: 这位大君意图引发的灾祸，也许远比「罗浮」星核危机更为严重。因为它的目标……
t_en: The disaster that this Lord Ravager intends to trigger may be far more severe than the Luofu's Stellaron Crisis. Because its goal is...

t_ch: 席卷全银河的灾难？
t_en: A cosmic-scale disaster?

t_ch: 正是。若现实如测算的那样，一路向着最恶劣的可能性发展，后果不堪设想。因为这位大君的目标……
t_en: Affirmative. If everything unfolds toward the worst possible outcome as predicted, the consequences will be unimaginable. Because the Lord Ravager's goal is...

t_ch: 是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」的星神</color>{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Nous</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>The Aeon of Erudition</color>{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 略去个中繁杂的推演，我向二位提出请求：为阻止「毁灭」的怒火席卷寰宇，恳请一位无名客能留在翁法罗斯，承担内应。
t_en: Putting aside the complex details of the inferences involved, I have a request to make, for one of you Nameless, to stay behind on Amphoreus, acting as an informant, in order to prevent the wrath of Destruction from ravaging the cosmos.

t_ch: 这个世界被难以言明的「防火墙」笼罩，时间的流速也和现实不同，我和黑塔女士只能撕开一道缝隙，将影像投射进内部。
t_en: This world is enveloped in a "firewall" that defies explanation, and the flow of time here is also different from reality. Madam Herta and I can only tear open a gap and project images inside.

t_ch: 但——抛开车厢坠毁的意外——两位却成功降落在此地，这背后一定有尚未被参透的原理。
t_en: However — the accidental crash landing of the Express Car notwithstanding — both of you were able to successfully land here. There must be some principle behind this we have yet to fully grasp.

t_ch: 揭秘需要时间。在那之前，若有一位无名客愿意留下，见证世界的命运，或在必要时推动其进程——将会是莫大的帮助。
t_en: It will take time to uncover the reason. Before then, if one of the Nameless is willing to stay and witness the fate of this world — or to push it along when necessary — it would be of great assistance.

t_ch: 我来负起这个责任。
t_en: I will shoulder this responsibility.

t_ch: 螺丝先生，我相信你，所以只想确认一件事：翁法罗斯已经面临末日，留下来的人要如何保障安全？
t_en: Mr. Screwllum, I believe you, so I only have one thing I'd like to confirm with you. As Amphoreus is already facing its end, how can we guarantee the safety of the person who stays behind?

t_ch: 可以两人一起留下。
t_en: Two people can stay.

t_ch: 出于一些原因，我不建议这么做。
t_en: There are reasons for which I must recommend against such a course of action.

t_ch: 丹恒，你觉得呢？
t_en: What say you, Dan Heng?

t_ch: 螺丝先生，我相信你，所以只想确认一件事：翁法罗斯已经面临末日，留下来的人要如何保障安全？
t_en: Mr. Screwllum, I believe you, so I only have one thing I'd like to confirm with you. As Amphoreus is already facing its end, how can we guarantee the safety of the person who stays behind?

t_ch: 请看这里——
t_en: Look at this, if you would—

t_ch: 这是名为「识刻锚」的奇物，二位可以将其视作<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」世界中的界域定锚。</color>
t_en: This Curio is called a "Chronocognitive Anchor." The two of you may view it as <color=#dbc291ff>a kind of Space Anchor in the world of Erudition</color>.

t_ch: 只要随身携带，个体的数据结构就能得到保护，不受激烈的数字海啸影响。必要时，它也能成为内外沟通的桥梁。
t_en: As long as you carry it with you, your individual data structure will be protected and will remain unaffected by the influence of digital tsunamis. When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world.

t_ch: 当然█它并非█无限使用的奇物█只能为一人持有
t_en: Of course, ███ it is not ███ Curio with unlimited uses ███ may only be held by one person

t_ch: 链接█ █受到█ 影响，决定█ █尽快█
t_en: The connection ███ being ███ interfered with, decide ███ quickly as possible ████

t_ch: 最后的█ █两条█信息：
t_en: Two ███ final ███ messages

t_ch: 其一：█ ██ <color=#dbc291ff>名为██来古士 █ 的智械█可能██ 是一切的元凶 █</color>
t_en: One: <color=#dbc291ff>The Intellitron ██████ named ███████ Lygus ████ possibly █████ the primary culprit behind everything ██████</color>

t_ch: 其二：黑塔██发现了线索██——
t_en: Two: Herta ██ discovered a clue ██—

t_ch: ——<color=#dbc291ff>三月小姐██ 已经█ 被██ 卷入██ 翁法罗斯█</color>
t_en: —<color=#dbc291ff>Miss March █████ has ████ already been ████ drawn into ███ Amphoreus██</color>

t_ch: {NICKNAME}一边 创世涡心
t_en: {NICKNAME}, at Vortex of Genesis

t_ch: …怎么啦，伙伴？
t_en: ...You okay there, friend?

t_ch: 人家觉得，你好像若有所思？
t_en: Something seems to be bothering you.

t_ch: （创世涡心…终于还是回来了。）
t_en: (The Vortex of Genesis... we made it back.)

t_ch: （这里，也变得不一样了……）
t_en: (Even this place has changed...)

t_ch: （白厄，他准备好「再创世」了吗…？）
t_en: (Phainon... is he ready for Era Nova?)

t_ch: 丹恒一个人回去，有点担心。
t_en: I hope Dan Heng will be okay heading back on his own.

t_ch: 哎呀，这种情况，应该是他更担心你才对吧？安心，人家会替他守护你的！
t_en: If anything, he's the one worried about you! But I'm here to watch over you now!

t_ch: 要不还是叫上丹恒一起…
t_en: Maybe Dan Heng should be here...

t_ch: …现在说这个，怕不是有些晚啦。
t_en: ...It's a bit late for that now, isn't it?

t_ch: 无论如何，我们得走到最后。
t_en: No matter what, we need to see it through the end.

t_ch: 是啊，真是一段好长好长的路呢……
t_en: Yeah... we've come such a long way...

t_ch: 如果和那位机器先生说的一样，翁法罗斯注定会走向「毁灭」的结局…那人家也要陪伴在你身边，直到最后一刻。
t_en: If what that machine gentleman said is true, if Amphoreus is destined for destruction... then I'll stay by your side until the very end.

t_ch: 毕竟，就像列车之于你和丹恒…翁法罗斯也是人家的故乡呀。
t_en: Like how you and Dan Heng treasure the Express... Amphoreus means everything to me.

t_ch: 去见证「再创世」吧。
t_en: Time to see the Era Nova begin.

t_ch: 嗯！我们一起，去见证最后一颗火种归位吧！
t_en: Right! Time to see the last Coreflame restored!

t_ch: …而你，白厄阁下，将用那枚火种埋葬旧世，将万物带入一片灰色的未知——
t_en: But you, Lord Phainon, will bury the old world with that Coreflame, bringing all things into a gray unknown...

t_ch: ——无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
t_en: It doesn't matter. This cruel Flame-Chase Journey has made me abandon my fantasies. The future is not a paradise with a gentle west wind, waiting for us to step in...

t_ch: 如果等在前方的是一团混沌，那就由我将它撕裂……
t_en: If what lies ahead is a mass of chaos, I will tear it apart...

t_ch: …再引入第一缕烈阳的光芒。
t_en: ...Then usher in the first ray of blazing sunlight.

t_ch: …是你吗？
t_en: ...Is it you?

t_ch: 面对身后一线生机，却还是毅然选择向前。
t_en: With one last chance to turn back, you still step forward.

t_ch: …不愧为「开拓者」。
t_en: ...How befitting of a Trailblazer.

t_ch: 这是我的使命。
t_en: This is the path I must take.

t_ch: 呵呵，实不相瞒，我也怀抱着同样的想法而来。
t_en: As it happens, I find myself thinking the exact same thing.

t_ch: 不必讥讽我了。
t_en: Spare me your mockery.

t_ch: 呵呵，您多虑了。
t_en: (chuckles) You misunderstand.

t_ch: 世界临近溃灭，{RUBY_B#缇里西庇俄丝}万径之践行人{RUBY_E#}也已拥抱各自的命运……
t_en: As our world nears its end, {RUBY_B#Tribios}the ones who walk the infinite paths{RUBY_E#} have embraced their destiny...

t_ch: 身为神礼观众，我有义务见证世界的未来，并代她们主持最后的火种仪式——
t_en: As the Theoros, it is my duty to witness the world's future and oversee this final Coreflame ritual on their behalf—

t_ch: 「负世」之试炼——「再创世」仪式。
t_en: The Trial of Worldbearing — The ritual of Era Nova.

t_ch: 螺丝咕姆说你是幕后黑手。
t_en: Screwllum says you're behind all this.

t_ch: 呵，原来如此。在我介入并抹去他渗透的痕迹前，{NICKNAME}阁下已经与我那位同胞相遇了啊。
t_en: Ah, I see. So you met my kindred spirit before I could erase his traces.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，这是什么意思？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what are you saying?

t_ch: 这个家伙，他一定知道很多。
t_en: This one knows more than he's telling.

t_ch: 把秘密从他嘴里撬出来吧！
t_en: Time to make him talk!

t_ch: 我也曾有疑惑，为何一位土生土长的安提基色拉人，竟然懂得维修天外的载具？
t_en: I've had my suspicions. How does a native Antikytheran know so much about repairing vehicles from beyond the sky?

t_ch: 来古士阁下——有关「再创世」的一切，你究竟了解多少？请如实相告！
t_en: Lord Lygus — How much do you truly know about Era Nova? Tell us everything!
Hehe...

t_ch: 如此说来，我已无需再维持这「神礼观众」的伪装。你渴求真相，白厄阁下——你亦将得到真相。
t_en: Very well, I need no longer maintain this Theoros masquerade. You seek truth, Lord Phainon — and truth you shall have.

t_ch: 诚如诸位所知：当旧日的神明倒下，需要有人扛起断裂的支柱，填补神职空缺。为此，背负神权者必须战胜试炼，证明自己的资质。
t_en: As you know, when the old gods fell, someone had to bear their broken pillars, to fill the vacant seats. Those who would assume divine authority must prove themselves through trials.

t_ch: 然而，对刻法勒的半神而言，战胜试炼的可能性始终为零。因为「负世」之试炼正是神职本身——「再创世」并「肩负世界」——除非倒下，否则永无止境。
t_en: Yet, for Kephale's demigods, the possibility of overcoming the trials has forever been nonexistent. For the "Worldbearing" trial is the divine duty itself — bringing forth the "Era Nova" and bearing its weight is an endless ordeal, ceasing only upon collapse.

t_ch: 没错：「再创世」仪式并非顷刻就能完成的仪式，而是一场漫长的苦旅。当其他半神的牺牲之旅在此世告结，刻法勒则必须背负诸神火种，背负全世记忆，始终挺立……
t_en: Precisely: The "Era Nova" ritual is not something that can be completed in an instant. No, but a long and arduous journey. While the sacrificial journeys of other demigods conclude in this world, Kephale must shoulder the gods' Coreflames, bear the memories of all worlds, and stand unwavering...

t_ch: 直到来世…黑潮将负世者和他肩头的一切彻底吞噬为止。
t_en: Until the next world... when the black tide consumes the Bearer and all that they carry, leaving nothing behind.

t_ch: …除非有来人接过他的火种。
t_en: ...Unless their Coreflame finds a new bearer.

t_ch: 映照全世的圣火已在阁下手中。如今所要做的，不过一个抉择……
t_en: The holy flame that illuminates all worlds rests in your hands. All that remains is one choice...

t_ch: 照料它，并向后世呈递；亦或是就此将其掐灭？
t_en: Nurture it, pass it on to future generations, or extinguish it here and now?

t_ch: 救世主，全世的命运由您亲自定夺。
t_en: Deliverer, the fate of all worlds rests in your hands.

t_ch: 不用再多试探了，我心意已决。
t_en: Enough testing. I've made my decision.

t_ch: 但在为来世破晓引火前，我需要你的承诺——两个承诺。
t_en: But before I ignite the dawn of the next world, you need to promise me something — two things, actually.

t_ch: 我洗耳恭听。
t_en: Speak your terms.

t_ch: 我要你告诉我：那刻夏老师对「新世界」的描绘确凿无疑。世界将依我的记忆再造，生者和死者都将重生为最初的人类，与他们前世无异……
t_en: Promise me this: Professor Anaxa's vision of the "New World" is absolute. The world will be reborn from my memories, all souls, living and dead, will return as the first humans, unchanged from their past lives...
